title: Endurance flight test
procedure: Fly the representative mission profile in nominal daytime conditions.
success_criteria: Measured endurance is at least 45 minutes.

title: Alert latency exercise
procedure: Inject calibrated hotspot imagery and measure alert publication latency.
success_criteria: Elapsed time from candidate detection to alert publication is 60 seconds or less.

title: Backhaul loss degraded-mode test
procedure: Interrupt LTE backhaul during mission execution and observe system behavior.
success_criteria: The mission computer enters degraded mode within 5 seconds and retains mission data.

title: Audit log review
procedure: Inspect stored mission logs after a representative sortie.
success_criteria: Commands, mission events, and alerts are recoverable from the audit log.

title: Coverage demonstration
procedure: Run a simulated sortie over the planned survey polygon.
success_criteria: The sortie covers at least 25 square kilometers in the required altitude band.

title: Battery energy budget analysis
procedure: Review the battery configuration, usable depth of discharge, and mission load profile.
success_criteria: Calculated usable energy is at least 900 watt-hours.

title: Alert message contract test
procedure: Emit an alert from the mission computer and validate the JSON payload.
success_criteria: Timestamp, GPS position, confidence, and snapshot URI fields are present and populated.

title: Telemetry buffering analysis
procedure: Calculate event buffer depth against representative outage conditions.
success_criteria: The communications subsystem can buffer at least 300 events before overwrite.

title: Thermal payload range test
procedure: Measure thermal image performance at 500 meters altitude using a calibrated target set.
success_criteria: Ground sample distance is 1 meter or better.

title: Operator alert display demonstration
procedure: Forward a new alert to the ground station and time the operator display update.
success_criteria: A new alert is displayed to the operator within 5 seconds.

title: GNSS degraded loiter test
procedure: Inject GNSS degradation and monitor autopilot fallback behavior.
success_criteria: The airframe enters loiter hold for at least 10 minutes pending override or return-to-home.
